scripts.test:e2e: electron-vite build --mode test && npx playwright test --config=e2e/playwright.config.ts --project=smoke --project=server
scripts.test:e2e:ai: electron-vite build --mode test && npx playwright test --config=e2e/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:smoke: electron-vite build --mode test && npx playwright test --config=e2e/playwright.config.ts --project=smoke
scripts.pack: bash ../../scripts/download-runtime.sh && electron-vite build && node ../../scripts/bundle-server.mjs && node ../../scripts/preflight-check.mjs && electron-builder --dir
scripts.dist: bash ../../scripts/download-runtime.sh && electron-vite build && node ../../scripts/bundle-server.mjs && node ../../scripts/preflight-check.mjs && electron-builder
scripts.dist:mac: bash ../../scripts/download-runtime.sh && electron-vite build && node ../../scripts/bundle-server.mjs && node ../../scripts/preflight-check.mjs --target mac && electron-builder --mac
scripts.dist:linux: bash ../../scripts/download-runtime.sh && electron-vite build && node ../../scripts/bundle-server.mjs && node ../../scripts/preflight-check.mjs --target linux && electron-builder --linux
scripts.dist:win: bash ../../scripts/download-runtime.sh && electron-vite build && node ../../scripts/bundle-server.mjs && node ../../scripts/preflight-check.mjs --target win && electron-builder --win
